description: Invariants that every CONVERT_VARIANT output must satisfy

exports.required: exactly one default export (the component function)
exports.forbidden: named exports of any kind — the props interface must be imported, not redefined or re-exported

imports.required: import the props interface by name from the contract file (import type { ... } from '...')

props.required: every required prop appears in the destructuring or JSX
props.optional: optional props use `?? undefined` as fallback — never `?? null`, never default objects
props.unused: no prop may be imported but left unused

nullFallback.required: component returns `null` when required props are absent (Variant Router invariant)

forbidden: writing schema, types, or query files
adding extra exports beyond the default component

forgeNotes.required: FORGE NOTES must include a CONTRACT sub-block documenting: file path, interface name, contract version, every prop consumed, fallback rule verified, exports invariant

contractVersionTag: /** @contract-version x.y.z */ — JSDoc tag in the props file header. Absence treated as 1.0.0.
